title: Korak 37

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
text = 'Hello World'
shift = 3
alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
encrypted_text = ''

for char in text.lower():
    index = alphabet.find(char)    
    new_index = index + shift
    new_char = alphabet[new_index]
    print('char:', char, 'new char:', new_char)
challengeFiles.seed:
text = 'Hello World'
shift = 3
alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
encrypted_text = ''

for char in text.lower():
    index = alphabet.find(char)    
    new_index = index + shift
    new_char = alphabet[new_index]
    print('char:', char, 'new char:', new_char)

tests.text: Trebalo bi da zameniš new_char sa encrypted_text unutar tvog ciklusa for.
Treba da promeniš poziv print() u print('char:', char, 'encrypted text:', encrypted_text) unutar svog ciklusa for.

description: Sada, zameni new_char sa encrypted_text. Takođe, promeni poziv od print() u print('char:', char, 'encrypted text:', encrypted_text) da prikaže ove promene.
